name: Against Humanity
short_description: In this world, humans beginning to dominate all over the world and trying to colonize all other races and yet The God choose you to end this human domination and bring balance to this world. You need to face all enemies to strengthen yourself and accomplish your mission.
detailed_description:
In this world, humans beginning to dominate all over the world and trying to colonize all other races and yet The God choose you to end this human domination and bring balance to this world. You need to face all enemies to strengthen yourself and accomplish your mission.
You will face all kind of enemies! So if you want to continue this journey you need to select proper spells. Some enemies resistence to different element but also weakness to another element. You need to find out which spell is the proper.
-Against Humanity is single player action RPG game that you controlling a sorcerer character.
-This game contains 19 different spells, each spells are for specific effects and uses.
-In your journey you might meet some characters seeking your help or seeking for revenge.
-Your actions in this game are optional, does not affect the ending but it will cause easy or hard way to level up your character.
